title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is a large language model released by MoonShot AI designed for coding tasks and long-running agent swarm work. The model represents maturation of MoonShot AI's LLM offering alongside other capable models from Chinese AI labs.
